title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
